productName: Sky High & High Tide Hash Hole 1g - Apple Rain (Sky High) & whistle tip (High tide ) (H) DOH
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Apple Rain and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a crisp, sweet apple flavor, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
